properties.name: cn
properties.description: 'Common Name' as defined in SSL certificate (hostname)

properties.name: reverse-proxy-uri
properties.description: URI of the reverse proxy in front of the BFF and the frontend

properties.name: issuer
properties.description: OpenID Provider's identifier. The OpenID configuration should be available by appending /.well-known/openid-configuration to it

properties.name: bdp-labs.keycloak-admin-api.secret
properties.description: OAuth2 client secret for the REST API to call Keycloak's admin API
